channel.title: MITRE Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by MITRE Corporation (mitre).

item.title: CVE-2026-52476
item.description: SQL Injection vulnerability in aiflowy <= 2.1.2 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the getPageData method in the DatacenterQuery.java file

item.title: CVE-2026-52475
item.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in aiflowy <= 2.1.2 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the UploadController.java file

item.title: CVE-2026-52474
item.description: An issue in aiflowy <= 2.1.2 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the JobUtil.java file.

item.title: CVE-2026-52472
item.description: SQL injection vulnerability in Wgcloud 3.6.4 allows a remote attacker to escalate privileges via the PortInfoMapper.xml file

item.title: CVE-2026-52470
item.description: SQL injection vulnerability in Crocus v.1.3.44 allows a remote attacker to escalate privileges via the RecordStateMapper.xml file

item.title: CVE-2026-52469
item.description: SQL injection vulnerability in Crocus v.1.3.44 allows a remote attacker to escalate privileges via the DeviceInfoMapper.xml file

item.title: CVE-2026-50759
item.description: An issue in exo-explore exo 1.0.69 allows a remote attacker to escalate privileges via the GET /state and DELETE /instance/{instance_id} endpoints with no authentication.

item.title: CVE-2026-50758
item.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in DayuanJiang next-ai-draw-io 0.4.13 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the mcp parameter

item.title: CVE-2026-50757
item.description: Directory Traversal vulnerability in DayuanJiang next-ai-draw-io 0.4.13 allowsa remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the nex-ai-draw-io/mcp-server

item.title: CVE-2026-50756
item.description: An issue in DayuanJiang next-ai-draw-io 0.4.13 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the x-ai-provider component

item.title: CVE-2026-50755
item.description: An issue in DayuanJiang next-ai-draw-io 0.4.13 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the X-Forwarded-For header value

item.title: CVE-2026-30633
item.description: Directory traversal vulnerability in knowns-dev/knowns 0.11.4 via crafted path value to the get_doc and update_doc tools.

item.title: CVE-2026-30632
item.description: Directory traversal vulnerability in knowns-dev/knowns 0.11.4 via crafted folder name value to the create_doc tool.

item.title: CVE-2026-30631
item.description: An issue was discovered in bytebot-ai in commit 3d37894ce07ef8d8b40adc7fd309ad96c2a71313 (2025-09-11) allowing attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted path to `computer_write_file`.

item.title: CVE-2025-68640
item.description: The Apple Find My backend service through 2025-12-17 allows an attacker in possession of a valid PET (Private Endpoint Token) to enumerate devices and remove offline devices from an Apple ID account without triggering two-factor authentication or own…

item.title: CVE-2025-66390 🤔
item.description: In Microsoft Azure API Management through 2025-10-17, when self-service signup (username/password Basic Authentication) is enabled in Tenant A, an attacker can reuse the registration flow by changing the hostname or tenant identifier to Tenant B, eve…

item.title: CVE-2026-52656 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An issue in SJCAM AllWinner Tech products SJ4000-Air V1.4C and before and Whitelabel based v.1.4C and before allows an attacker to execute arbitrary code via a crafted FEX file

item.title: CVE-2026-52349 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Directory Traversal vulnerability in Menyoo 2.0 Versions before commit 729aa48: fixed in commit 729aa48 allows a local attacker to execute arbitrary code via the Spooner file management, VehicleSpawner save/folder/rename functionality, WeaponOptions…

item.title: CVE-2026-51385 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: An issue in safishamsi Open-Source GRAPHIFY v.0.3.2 through v0.4.29 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the validate_url, safe_fetch, _build_opener, _fetch_html and _download_binary functions.

item.title: CVE-2026-51031 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: FlareSolverr before version 3.4.7 contains a server-side request forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in the /v1 API endpoint. This allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information

item.title: CVE-2026-51027 · 9.9 CRITICAL
item.description: An issue in FileThingie v.2.5.7 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the ft2.php component.

item.title: CVE-2026-51026 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Directory Traversal vulnerability in FileThingie v.2.5.7 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via a crafted request.

item.title: CVE-2026-51025 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Cross Site Scripting vulnerability in fuint Member Marketing System <=v1.0 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the ClientMessageController.java file

item.title: CVE-2026-26483 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Mettle SendPortal 3.0.1 and earlier contains a stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the template management functionality. The application fails to properly sanitize user-supplied input in the content parameter of the /templates endpoin…

item.title: CVE-2026-26081 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: HAProxy Community Edition 3.0 through 3.3 before 3.3.3 lacks a length check for the NEW_TOKEN format. HAProxy Enterprise and ALOHA are also affected.

item.title: CVE-2026-26080 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️
item.description: HAProxy Community Edition 3.2.x through 3.3.x before 3.3.3 can enter a loop or crash because varint is mishandled. HAProxy Enterprise and ALOHA are also affected.

item.title: CVE-2024-51316 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The Tenda TX9 V22.03.02.20 firmware has a denial of service vulnerability in the update_dev_name function of the file /goform/SetOnlineDevName

item.title: CVE-2024-51315 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The Tenda TX9 V22.03.02.20 firmware has a stack overflow vulnerability in the sub_425964 function of the file /goform/SetOnlineDevName

item.title: CVE-2024-51314 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The Tenda TX9 V22.03.02.20 firmware has a stack overflow vulnerability in the sub_424CE0 function of the file /goform/setMacFilterCfg.

item.title: CVE-2024-51313 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The Tenda TX9 V22.03.02.20 firmware has a stack overflow vulnerability in the sub_42EA38 function of the file /goform/SetVirtualServerCfg.

item.title: CVE-2024-51312 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The Tenda TX9 V22.03.02.20 firmware has a stack overflow vulnerability in the sub_42EEE0 function of the file /goform/SetStaticRouteCfg.

item.title: CVE-2024-51311 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: The Tenda TX9 V22.03.02.05 firmware has a stack overflow vulnerability in the sub_4418CC function of the file /goform/SetNetControlList.

item.title: CVE-2026-52584 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in libjxl v.0.11.2 and before allows a local attacker to obtain sensitive information via the DecodeImageAPNG function

item.title: CVE-2026-52348 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: cool-admin-java 8.0.0 has a SQL injection vulnerability in the order() method of CrudOption.java.

item.title: CVE-2026-52203 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in MCMS v.6.1.1 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the source parameter.

item.title: CVE-2026-52199 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An issue in Generic OEM UZ801_v2.1 4G LTE Router V3.4.3 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the sbin/adbd component

item.title: CVE-2026-51833 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Xenforo 2.3.8 is vulnerable to SSRF. Attackers that have administrator privileges or are able to add/save RSS feeds can enumerate internal services (ports) or expose the original IP address of the server.

item.title: CVE-2026-51083 · 6.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Incorrect access control in Proxmox Virtual Environment (PVE) 9.x qemu-server before 9.1.8 and 8.x before 8.4.8 allows users within limited privileges to obtain hashed passwords via the cloudinit/dump API.

item.title: CVE-2026-51082 · 7.2 HIGH
item.description: A race condition between the vncproxy and vncwebsocket API calls in Proxmox Virtual Environment (PVE) 9.x pve-manager before 9.1.9 and 8.x before 8.4.19; qemu-server 9.x before 9.1.7 and 8.x before 8.4.7; and pve-container before 6.1.3 (PVE 9.x) and…

item.title: CVE-2026-51081 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in Proxmox Virtual Environment (PVE) 9.x 5.1.8 and Proxmox Virtual Environment (PVE) 8.x 4.3.16 allows attackers to execute arbitrary web scripts or HTML via injecting a crafted payload.

item.title: CVE-2026-51080 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: libpvestorage-perl v9.1.1 and libpve-storage-perl v8.3.7 were discovered to contain an XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability.

item.title: CVE-2026-42168 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: django-pyas2 through 1.2.3 is vulnerable to OS command injection via the cmd_receive and cmd_send fields on the Partner model. These fields are passed directly to os.system() in pyas2/utils.py without sanitization, allowing an authenticated admin use…

item.title: CVE-2026-36669 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An unauthenticated arbitrary file upload vulnerability in ck_upload_handler.php in Feng Office 3.11.13.11 allows remote attackers to upload malicious files (such as .html) to the web-accessible /tmp/ directory.

item.title: CVE-2025-60357 · 8.1 HIGH
item.description: AhnLab EPP Management v1.0.14.32-6249 was discovered to contain a NoSQL injection vulnerability via the eventlog/agentEvent/list endpoint.

item.title: CVE-2025-51678 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue was discovered in RISC-V PicoRV32 commit 87c89a. A mismatch in the PCPI INSN and memory address can lead to unexpected behavior.

item.title: CVE-2025-51677 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An issue was discovered in openRISC OR1200 commit 83ac6b. An output mismatch between the RTL and the netlist of the or1200 cpu output port can lead to unexpected behavior.

item.title: CVE-2026-47089 · 4.3 MEDIUM
item.description: An issue was discovered in cyrus-imapd in Cyrus IMAP through 3.12.2. LISTRIGHTS os not limited to users with admin access. An authenticated user could call IMAP LISTRIGHTS against any mailbox they could name and learn what principals had what access…

item.title: CVE-2026-47088 · 3.1 LOW
item.description: An issue was discovered in cyrus-imapd in Cyrus IMAP through 3.12.2. There is heap exposure in nested MIME comment parsing. An authenticated IMAP user could craft an email message containing an RFC 822 comment ending with a backslash. When parsing th…

item.title: CVE-2026-47087 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: An issue was discovered in cyrus-imapd in Cyrus IMAP through 3.12.2. URLAUTH does not honor revoked authorizer access. A URLAUTH URL minted while the authorizer had access continued to work after that access was revoked.

item.title: CVE-2026-47086 · 3.5 LOW
item.description: An issue was discovered in cyrus-imapd in Cyrus IMAP through 3.12.2. GENURLAUTH-issued tokens can bypass ACLs. Any authenticated user could mint a URLAUTH token (via the GENURLAUTH command) for any mailbox they could name, even without read access on…
